title: Notion Trigger fails with EAI_AGAIN error in automated runs
symptom: When executing a workflow with a Notion Trigger automatically, it throws a 'getaddrinfo EAI_AGAIN' error. However, manual execution of the same workflow works without issues.
not_this_if: Error does not occur in manual execution mode
root_cause: The EAI_AGAIN error indicates a DNS resolution issue, which can occur due to network configuration problems or transient DNS issues. In this case, it seems to affect automated executions but not manual ones, possibly due to differences in execution environments or timing.
fix_steps: Create a new workflow and replicate the existing Notion Trigger setup by copying and pasting the nodes.
Save the new workflow and test it to see if the error persists.
agent_instruction: Replicate the Notion Trigger setup in a new workflow and test it.
